summary: Full backend + frontend E2E test of Stock Dip Analyzer. All 14 pytest backend tests passed and all critical UI flows (watchlist add/remove, refresh, test notification, stock detail dialog with price/MA/RSI charts) verified via Playwright.

issues: Recharts ResponsiveContainer emits transient width/height(-1) warnings on mount before dialog layout settles; charts still render correctly. Consider setting minWidth=0 / fixed height on ResponsiveContainer parent.

action_items: (Optional) Silence Recharts width/height(-1) warnings by giving the chart container an explicit height and minWidth=0 on the Dialog content.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py directly reads os.environ['MONGO_URL']/['DB_NAME'] at import time - good (fails fast), matches guidelines.
data.py uses async Mongo cache + stale fallback + in-memory fallback + 2x yfinance retry - robust.
notifier.send_strong_dip_alert correctly never raises; returns bool.
Scheduler dedupes via alert_log keyed by (ticker, date) - correct.
All endpoints return non-_id projections via {'_id':0} - no ObjectId serialization issues.
CORS middleware added after router include_router - works in FastAPI but convention is to add before; non-blocking.
analyze_all signature accepts db_arg but ignores it and uses module-level db - harmless but inconsistent; scheduler passes db arg.
seed_data_creation: Test added HDFCBANK.NS then removed it; cleanup confirmed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs: /, /status, /watchlist (GET/POST/DELETE), /analyze, /stock/{ticker}, /refresh, /test-notification, /alerts/today all verified. Frontend has data-testid: app-header, status-scheduler, status-notifier, test-notification-button, best-buy-card, add-ticker-input, add-ticker-button, ticker-chip-<T>, remove-ticker-<T>, refresh-data-button, analysis-table, stock-row-<T>, stock-detail-dialog, price-chart, rsi-chart. REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://value-signal-1.preview.emergentagent.com (different from problem statement URL). yfinance live calls cached in Mongo with 45min TTL.
